title: The FDA Tells Factories When It's Coming
description: More than 80% of active ingredients in U.S. generic drugs are made overseas, in factories the FDA inspects with up to 12 weeks' advance notice. That head start gives manufacturers time to clean floors, update logbooks, and rotate flagged equipment before inspectors arrive. This is not a loophole — it's the program.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for The FDA Tells Factories When It's Coming
